title: The Rise of Robots: Transforming Our World
passage:
The Impact of Artificial Intelligence and Robotics

Artificial intelligence (AI) and robotics are increasingly becoming a part of our daily lives. From smart home devices to autonomous vehicles, these technologies are reshaping how we interact with the world. AI refers to computer systems that can perform tasks normally requiring human intelligence. This includes problem-solving, understanding natural language, and even recognizing images. Robotics, on the other hand, involves creating machines that can perform tasks automatically, usually in a repetitive manner.

One of the most significant benefits of AI and robotics is their ability to improve efficiency in various sectors. In manufacturing, for example, robots can work around the clock, producing goods at a faster rate than human workers. This not only increases productivity but also reduces the risk of human error. Additionally, AI can analyze vast amounts of data quickly, helping businesses make better decisions.

However, the rise of these technologies also raises concerns. Many fear that robots will replace human jobs, leading to unemployment. While it is true that some jobs may become obsolete, new opportunities are likely to emerge as well. For instance, there will be a growing need for technicians who can maintain and repair these machines.

Moreover, ethical considerations must be taken into account. As AI systems become more sophisticated, questions about privacy and security arise. The use of AI in surveillance, for example, can lead to potential abuses of power if not regulated properly.

In conclusion, while artificial intelligence and robotics offer numerous advantages, it is essential to navigate their development responsibly. By addressing the challenges they present, society can harness their potential while minimizing negative impacts.

questions.instruction: Choose the correct letter, A, B, C or D.
questions.text: What is the main benefit of AI and robotics mentioned in the passage?

options.B: Replacement of human workers in all industries.
options.C: The ability to understand human emotions.

questions.explanation: The passage highlights that one significant benefit of AI and robotics is their ability to improve efficiency in various sectors, particularly in manufacturing.

questions.text: AI systems are designed to perform tasks that require human intelligence.
questions.explanation: The passage clearly states that AI refers to systems that can perform tasks normally requiring human intelligence.

questions.text: The author believes robots will completely take over human jobs.
questions.explanation: The passage mentions that while some jobs may become obsolete, new opportunities are likely to emerge, indicating that the author does not believe robots will completely take over jobs.

questions.instruction: Match the information to the correct paragraph.

text.2: The role of robots in manufacturing.

vocabulary.meaning: no longer in use or no longer useful.

tactics:
Hướng dẫn

To effectively answer the questions, focus on skimming the passage for main ideas and scanning for specific details. Pay attention to the differences between facts and opinions, especially in questions related to the author's perspective. For vocabulary, understanding the context in which words are used can help clarify their meanings.
